fast_confirmation_rule.highlight: FCR decreases confirmation time from 13 minutes to 13 seconds
Safety assumptions: network synchrony and <25% adversarial stake
Safe block tag repurposed from justification to FCR
First clients ready for testing end of March; production Q2
Different clients may return different safe blocks during transition

rpc_method_updates.highlight: testing_buildBlockV1 ready to merge after conflict resolution
eth_getStorageValues implemented in Geth, Reth, Erigon; Nethermind in progress
eth_getTransactionBySenderAndNonce requires new index; implementation complexity uncertain

organizational.highlight: JWT secrets PR (297) closed; no client consensus after 3 years
Engine API and REST endpoint changes not in scope for RPC call

action_items.action: Announce merged error code spec to client teams
Resolve conflicts and merge testing_buildBlockV1 PR #747

decisions.decision: Safe block tag repurposed for FCR instead of justification
Close PR #297 (JWT secrets) due to lack of client interest

targets.target: End of March - First FCR clients ready for testing
